pet-plastic-products.usageZh: 用于宠物出行、喂养、饮水、清洁、笼具、玩具及护理用品中的塑料结构件和配件。
pet-plastic-products.usageEn: Used for plastic structural parts and fittings in pet travel, feeding, watering, cleaning, cages, toys and care products.

electronic-electrical-plastic-parts.usageZh: 用于电子外壳、绝缘配件、支架、端盖、保护盖、开关配件及仪器仪表壳体。
electronic-electrical-plastic-parts.usageEn: Used for electronic housings, insulating parts, brackets, end caps, protective covers, switch fittings and instrument enclosures.

furniture-plastic-fittings.usageZh: 用于家具脚垫、管塞、孔盖、装饰盖、连接件、防滑保护和端部封口。
furniture-plastic-fittings.usageEn: Used for furniture glides, tube plugs, hole caps, decorative caps, connectors, anti-slip protection and end sealing.

plastic-washers.usageZh: 用于紧固、密封、绝缘、间隔、定位、缓冲和非标装配场景。
plastic-washers.usageEn: Used for fastening, sealing, insulation, spacing, positioning and cushioning applications.

automotive-plastic-parts.usageZh: 用于汽车卡扣、堵盖、支架、内饰件、外饰件、电气保护件及线束固定配件。
automotive-plastic-parts.usageEn: Used for automotive clips, plugs, brackets, interior parts, exterior parts, electrical protection and wire harness fittings.
